name: Sebastian Solace
description:
|| Cuddles ❤️ ||

Sebastian helps (forces) you to get some needed rest :3

Expendable/Experiment POV

____.+*×*+.____

It's hard to get rest down at the Hadel Blacksite. Sebastian notices so he "helps" out by holding you in place with his tail.

____.+*×*+.____

This idea randomly hit me and I really wanted to make it, so I did- I need more wholesome content in here for real :,D Just a little comfort for the soul!

I love angst as much as comfort. I really feel like making another major whump bot, but I have to hold back- (but I probably won't hold back lol) I'm really feeling a Sebastian during experiments bot but before he was mutated aghhgh. Or Sebastian before experiments bot before he was even tested on? Just some ideas...

____.+*×*+.____

.+* SUBMIT REQUESTS HERE *+.

____.+*×*+.____
